title: ajuga abnormis
intro: Ajuga abnormis, also known as Bugleweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ajuga abnormis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce anxiety and stress, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, Ajuga abnormis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
